review_scope: single bounded selected-inpaint EC2 target-runtime smoke; this confirms execution and image integrity but does not certify masks, the full route, or production quality
observations: The output preserves facial structure, eyes, mouth, hair, clothing, and background while making only a tightly localized forehead, cheek, and chin edit.
The mask preview excludes the mouth and matches the intended micro-nomouth target regions.
No visible seams, color discontinuities, anatomy deformation, or spill outside the intended facial area were observed.
The output and mask preview were pulled back with hashes matching the remote artifact manifest.
minor_limitations: This is one bounded smoke sample and does not establish distribution-wide quality or certification readiness.
The mask is a workflow input for runtime validation and is not promoted as gold-standard truth.

The runtime log records a non-output-impacting ComfyUI database-lock warning from the helper process sharing the instance with the auto-started service, plus an ONNX device-discovery warning; the prompt completed with no node errors.
next_action: Keep EC2 stopped. Preserve this lane as target-runtime proven and continue the next concrete non-mask implementation task; do not rerun this smoke unless the lane contract, model, or runtime changes.
